shots.keyframe_moment: 幼儿园铁艺大门和玻璃幕墙在阳光下闪光，豪车停满门口
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only establishing shot of kindergarten exterior; no characters, dialogue, or props; location is default scene_name.

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌和予予站在门口，其他家长开豪车经过
shots.reasoning_brief: Mother and child in mid-shot at entrance; visible characters sorted by relation (mother-child); no dialogue or handoffs.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_PARENT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这个人怎么进的星辉？赞助费一年二十万，她穿得像刚从菜市场来的。
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 低声对闺蜜，瞥向沈念歌

shots.keyframe_moment: 风衣妈妈低声对闺蜜说话，瞥向沈念歌
shots.reasoning_brief: Wind coat mom speaking to friend about Shen; listener is implied friend (not in characters list, but contextual); action glance at Shen but not target; visible mom and her child.

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌低头看着自己的衣服和鞋子
shots.reasoning_brief: Solo shot of Shen looking down; no dialogue; economic state implied but not visual body overlay.

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌牵紧予予的手走向幼儿园大门
shots.reasoning_brief: Mother tightening grip on child and entering; action target child via hand-holding.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，你在想什么？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child speaking to mother; gaze upward; visible sorted child to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 在想予予今天要好好表现。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother responding to child; mutual relation.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 放心吧！我最厉害了！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child boasting to mother; posture indicates confidence.

shots.keyframe_moment: 孩子们和家长坐成圈，老师站在中间
shots.reasoning_brief: Group shot in classroom; visible teacher central, children/parents circle including key characters; cardinality approximate but exact for foreground.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 今天是我们中班的第一天，请小朋友们轮流做自我介绍好不好？先说名字，再说一个关于自己的秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher addressing group; listeners children including Shen child.

shots.keyframe_moment: 予予站起来，背带松一边
shots.reasoning_brief: Child standing for turn; visual dishevelment but not overlay state.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 大家好，我叫沈知予。小名予予。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child introducing to group; broad listeners.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的秘密是什么呀？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher questioning child directly.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但我还没见过他。等我找到他，他会变得很厉害。
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 想了想，很认真地说面对大家

shots.keyframe_moment: 予予认真看着大家说话
shots.reasoning_brief: Child sharing secret to group.

shots.keyframe_moment: 家长们微妙交换眼神，风衣妈妈轻笑
shots.reasoning_brief: Parents reacting; includes wind coat mom; cardinality for several but foreground 3 approx.

character_state_overlays.body_state: 手指紧握掌心显示紧张

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother in corner; overlay for visible tension in hands from evidence.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的爸爸一定很了不起。那你有没有什么爱好呢？
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 愣了一下，随即温柔地看着予予

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher responding gently to child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我喜欢画画。还有数学。100以内的加减法我都能算。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child listing hobbies to teacher.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 真的吗？那老师考考你。37加58等于多少？

shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher testing child.
Child quick answer.

shots.keyframe_moment: 老师愣住，小男孩掰手指
shots.reasoning_brief: Teacher and boy reacting; extra child with glasses.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这个很简单呀。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child commenting innocently.
Parents surprised; prop smartphone introduced but no handoff from previous empty.

prop_handoffs.source_evidence: line 75: 甚至有人掏出手机看了一眼

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌看着予予微微一笑后抿唇
shots.reasoning_brief: Mother watching child; prop from previous but no new action, continue off-screen.

shots.keyframe_moment: 豪车一辆辆驶过幼儿园门口
shots.reasoning_brief: Wide shot of cars; scene change to evening, no inheritance.

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌站在路边看着远处
shots.location_evidence: line 87: 沈念歌站在路边，等公交车
shots.reasoning_brief: Mother waiting; local location road edge.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪！今天老师说我是全班最聪明的！还给我多发了一颗小星星！

shots.location_evidence: nearby line 87: 沈念歌站在路边
shots.reasoning_brief: Child running to mother; excitement.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 真棒。
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 蹲下来帮他整理书包微笑

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌蹲下整理书包微笑
shots.reasoning_brief: Mother praising while adjusting backpack; action on child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，我告诉你一个秘密。

shots.reasoning_brief: Child whispering to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 什么秘密？

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother inquiring.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我今天在幼儿园走廊上看到一张照片。挂在荣誉墙上。一个穿西装的男人，下面写着'陆氏集团总裁陆景琛先生捐赠'。妈咪——就是医院的那个叔叔！
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 左右看了看，凑到她耳边

shots.keyframe_moment: 予予凑到沈念歌耳边低语
shots.reasoning_brief: Child revealing to mother; references LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN via alias.

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 沈念歌的表情僵了一瞬

shots.reasoning_brief: Close-up reaction; overlay for visible stiff expression.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 嗯……可能是吧。
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 声音尽量平稳勉强微笑

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother responding evasively.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我就知道！他就住在这个城市！妈咪，你今天不是去他上班的地方了吗？你有没有看到他？

shots.keyframe_moment: 予予眼睛发亮看着沈念歌
shots.reasoning_brief: Child excited questioning.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 走了，公交车来了。

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌牵手走向公交车
shots.reasoning_brief: Mother changing topic; action pulling child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，他既然捐赠了幼儿园，说明他是个好人。好人的话，应该不会不认自己的儿子吧？
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 被牵着上了车，还在回头看着幼儿园的方向

shots.keyframe_moment: 予予回头看着幼儿园说话
shots.reasoning_brief: Child persisting while boarding.

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 沈念歌的背影在公交车台阶上顿了一下

shots.reasoning_brief: Back view pause; overlay for visible hesitation.
Bus departing; no characters.

shots.keyframe_moment: 赵一鸣在车内看通讯录
shots.location_evidence: line 119: 幼儿园对面的一棵梧桐树下
shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant in car; local location tree under.

shots.keyframe_moment: 手机在赵一鸣手中响起
shots.reasoning_brief: Phone ringing; handoff as pickup for call.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 查到了吗？

shots.reasoning_brief: Phone call; voiceover no listener in frame beyond holder; prop continue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 查到了。陆总，那个孩子……确实在星辉。今天第一天入园。

shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant reporting; listener remote.
Silence on line; prop continue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 他今天说了什么？

shots.reasoning_brief: Remote question.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 他说……'我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但还没见过他。'

shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant relaying quote.
More silence.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: ……知道了。

shots.reasoning_brief: Remote soft response.

shots.keyframe_moment: 赵一鸣叹气，后视镜中公交远去
music_cues: 吉他轻拨，一丝暖意中带着悬念
shots.reasoning_brief: Call ends, sigh, mirror view; music from nearby; prop hangup.
